submitted_payload.suggested_entry: Ralph Workflow — free and open-source AI coding workflow system for developers who want plan-build-verify loops and reviewable repo-native handoffs instead of another raw chat session.

why_this_action: After repairing stale attempted-channel detection, the selector no longer exposed any untouched easy-submit directory lanes, but the workflow audit still says distribution to the primary repo is the live bottleneck. ToolHunter is a fresh developer-focused directory with a manual review process and a public submit surface, so direct curator outreach to its published editor address was the strongest legitimate same-run lane available from this runtime.

verification.submit_page_note: Public submit page exposes a Tally embed and promises manual review within 48 hours, but the runtime did not surface a first-party HTML form action to post directly.

measurement_window.success_signal: reply, live ToolHunter listing, or a third-party citation/backlink that points evaluators to the Codeberg primary repo
measurement_window.kill_condition: If no reply or listing signal arrives by 2026-06-06, do not resend the same pitch; replace it with a different untouched developer-tool curator surface or direct submission lane.
